title: Analytics - Settings Changed
scenario: Analytics event logged for setting changes in app or device sync, tracked via Firebase with device PID, global setting ID, and settings value
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on a connected device name to enter Device Settings.
Change any setting (e.g., toggle ANC, adjust Equalizer, change Transparency Mode).
Observe that the app logs an analytics event for the setting change.
Wait a few hours and check the Firebase dashboard.
In Firebase, locate the analytics event for the setting change.
Verify the event includes default elements: graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Verify the event also includes custom parameters: device PID, global setting ID, and settings value.
expected: The analytics event is logged in Firebase with all default elements (graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) plus custom parameters (device PID, global setting ID, settings value). Event counts update after a few hours.
